model_specification_line: model = smf.wls("fulltime_mean ~ eligible * post + running + I(running ** 2) + C(year) + C(sex) + C(statefip) + DRIVERSLICENSES + INSTATETUITION + STATEFINANCIALAID + HIGHEREDBAN + EVERIFY + LIMITEVERIFY + OMNIBUS + TASK287G + JAIL287G + SECURECOMMUNITIES + LFPR + UNEMP", data=model_df, weights=model_df["sample_weight"]).fit(cov_type="cluster", cov_kwds={"groups": model_df["statefip"]})
